subject: docs(cleanup): remove HISTORY.md — git already tracks history
body:
Removed the HISTORY.md changelog file and all references to it in CLAUDE.md,
SESSION_NOTES.md, and TODO.md. Git commit history is the source of truth for
completed work — a hand-maintained duplicate adds noise and drift risk.

Tags: docs, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: doc-hygiene
Semver: patch
